requirements.summary: Revert all frontend files to their exact Version 9 state, removing any features or changes introduced after Version 9
acceptanceCriteria: All frontend and backend files match their Version 9 state exactly.
No code, components, or features introduced after Version 9 are present.
The application builds and runs correctly from the Version 9 baseline.

file_operations.description: Restore App.tsx to its exact Version 9 state, reverting any route additions, provider changes, or structural modifications made after Version 9. This requires access to Version 9 source control history or backup.
Restore AboutPageEditor.tsx to its Version 9 implementation, removing any field additions, UI changes, or functionality enhancements introduced after Version 9.
Restore AdminLayout.tsx to Version 9, reverting any navigation changes, badge additions, or layout modifications.
Restore ArtworkForm.tsx to Version 9 field configuration and validation logic.
Restore BlogPostForm.tsx to Version 9 implementation, removing any post-Version-9 field or feature additions.
Restore CommissionsPageEditor.tsx to Version 9 editor capabilities and field structure.
Restore HeroEditor.tsx to Version 9 form fields and upload handling.
Restore InquiryRow.tsx to Version 9 status handling and UI.
Restore MediaTile.tsx to Version 9 implementation, removing any tag management or replacement features added after Version 9.
Restore NavigationEditor.tsx to Version 9 CRUD operations and save logic.
Restore PressEditor.tsx to Version 9 field structure and operations.
Restore TestimonialsEditor.tsx to Version 9 CRUD implementation.
Restore ArtworkCard.tsx to Version 9 rendering logic and badge configuration.
Restore BeforeAfterSlider.tsx to Version 9 interaction handling.
Restore CareerTimeline.tsx to Version 9 visual layout and rendering.
Restore CommissionInquiryForm.tsx to Version 9 validation and submission logic.
Restore ContactForm.tsx to Version 9 form fields and submission handling.
Restore FAQAccordion.tsx to Version 9 toggle and animation logic.
Restore Footer.tsx to Version 9 layout and content, removing any social platform additions, analytics display changes, or link modifications introduced after Version 9.
Restore Header.tsx to Version 9 navigation structure and mobile drawer implementation.
Restore Lightbox.tsx to Version 9 implementation, removing any social share buttons, multi-photo navigation changes, or zoom enhancements added after Version 9.
Restore MissingInfoText.tsx to Version 9 styling and message content.
Restore NewsletterSignup.tsx to Version 9 form handling and thank-you message.
Restore PlaceholderImage.tsx to Version 9 lazy-loading implementation.
Restore PressMentionCard.tsx to Version 9 card layout and field display.
Restore TestimonialCarousel.tsx to Version 9 auto-rotation and control logic.
Restore TestimonialGrid.tsx to Version 9 grid layout and card rendering.
Restore AuthContext.tsx to Version 9 authentication logic and state management.
Restore CMSContext.tsx to Version 9 data types and CRUD operations, removing any dynamic socialPlatforms CMS extension or other data model changes introduced after Version 9.
Restore About.tsx to Version 9 page layout and content sourcing.
Restore AdminLogin.tsx to Version 9 authentication UI and error handling.
Restore BlogManager.tsx to Version 9 blog post management interface.
Restore CommissionsManager.tsx to Version 9 inquiry filtering and display logic.
Restore Dashboard.tsx to Version 9 stats display and quick action links, removing any social media manager sections or analytics additions introduced after Version 9.
Restore GalleryManager.tsx to Version 9 artwork management interface and drag-drop implementation.
Restore MediaLibrary.tsx to Version 9 search/filter UI and upload handling.
Restore MessagesInbox.tsx to Version 9 message listing and status management.
Restore PagesEditor.tsx to Version 9 tabbed navigation and sub-editor configuration.
Restore Settings.tsx to Version 9 site configuration form fields and social media URL inputs, removing any dynamic platform management features added after Version 9.
Restore Commissions.tsx to Version 9 page sections and component layout.
Restore Contact.tsx to Version 9 form display and social media links configuration.
Restore Gallery.tsx to Version 9 filtering logic and lightbox integration.
Restore Home.tsx to Version 9 hero section, featured artworks grid, and page sections.
Restore Testimonials.tsx to Version 9 carousel/grid view toggle and press mention display.
Restore useActor.ts to Version 9 actor creation and caching logic.
Restore useInternetIdentity.ts to Version 9 Internet Identity integration.
Restore useLazyLoad.ts to Version 9 IntersectionObserver implementation.
Restore usePageMeta.ts to Version 9 document title and meta tag update logic.
Restore usePageViewTracker.ts to Version 9 page view increment logic.
Restore useQueries.ts to Version 9 React Query hooks for backend data fetching.
Restore useUniqueVisitorTracker.ts to Version 9 visitor tracking implementation.
Restore index.css to Version 9 global styles, CSS custom properties, and utility classes.
Restore frontend/index.css to Version 9 design token definitions and Tailwind configuration.
Restore main.tsx to Version 9 application entry point and provider wrapping.
Restore tailwind.config.js to Version 9 theme extensions, color palettes, and plugin configuration.
Restore index.html to Version 9 HTML shell structure and meta tags.
